name: Electronic Warfare Training
briefing: Welcome to Electronic Warfare Training. Learn to jam enemy sensors, deploy countermeasures, and execute a basic system intrusion. EW is a force multiplier — a jammed enemy is easier to destroy.

nodes.text: Review ECM suite status and available countermeasures
nodes.hint: The EW panel shows ECM power, jam range, and countermeasure charges. Check the tactical map — the red contact is your target. ECM effectiveness scales with power allocation from Engineering.

nodes.text: Activate jamming on the nearest contact
nodes.hint: Click the contact on the ECM map and press JAM TARGET. Jamming reduces the enemy's weapon accuracy. Watch the effectiveness percentage — higher ECM power and shorter range increase effectiveness. You can only jam one target at a time.

Press DEPLOY COUNTERMEASURES. This reduces incoming weapon accuracy against your ship for the duration. Countermeasure charges are finite — use them when taking fire, not preemptively. Watch the charge counter decrease.

Keep the jam active while monitoring ECM effectiveness. In a real engagement, you coordinate with Weapons — tell them which targets are jammed so they can focus fire on the most vulnerable. Communication is key.
